issue_summary: Trim lots of unused and redundant code. In particular
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Delegates to {@link Map#get}. Returns {@code null} on {@code
   * ClassCastException}.
   */
javadoc_after:
/**
   * Delegates to {@link Map#get}. Returns {@code null} on {@code
   * ClassCastException} and {@code NullPointerException}.
   */
